description: Represents a group attachment in a contract

gate.description:
Controls whether policy violations act as a gate for this group.
 - true: policy violations are blocking for this policy group
 - false: policy violations are non-blocking for this policy group
 - unset: inherit organization-level default behavior

ref.description: Group reference, it might be an URL or a provider reference

skip.description: policy names to skip (matched against metadata.name)

title: Policy Group Attachment
